title: secretx-aws-sm: implement AWS Secrets Manager backend
description: Implement SecretStore for AWS Secrets Manager. URI: secretx://aws-sm/<secret-name>[?field=<name>][?version=<stage>]. get() calls GetSecretValue; default stage AWSCURRENT. Optional ?field= query param: parse secret as JSON object and extract named string field via SecretValue::extract_field. put() calls PutSecretValue. refresh() bypasses cache and calls GetSecretValue directly. Credential chain via aws-config ambient chain (AWS_PROFILE, AWS_ROLE_ARN, instance metadata, ECS task role). Region from AWS_DEFAULT_REGION or SDK chain. Dep: secretx-core, aws-sdk-secretsmanager, aws-config. Integration tests via LocalStack.
